## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Related issue(s)

Fixes #(issue number) (if applicable).

## What changed

Brief description of your changes.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` run (no new warnings)
- [ ] Manual testnet run (if applicable): describe what you tested

## Schema / breaking changes

- [ ] No schema or message changes
- [ ] Schema or execute/query messages changed (describe below)

If you changed message types or state, note any impact on the frontend or other consumers.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`)
- [ ] Self-review done
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (e.g. CONTRACT_STATES_EXPLAINED.md, README)
